system.powerDescription:
You gently manipulate the polarity of the leylines around you, coaxing life into different hues. Choose one of the following effects for up to CAT area; 

• Plant life grows at an incredibly increased rate, and you may slightly alter the course of its growth. 
• Water begins quickly welling up from the ground, even if the area is made of impermeable materials. 
• The land itself begins to glow brightly, up to the intensity of a spotlight. 
• Animals in the area become friendly to you and will defend you from attackers while you are in the area. 

This power may affect the parameters of rolls, such as difficulty and risk.
